title: 縛られる子、縛られない子

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Hey, hey, you called me all of a sudden, but why
so down?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Be still my anxious heart... You have to listen,
C.B. Today happens to be...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The most terrible, awful, unluckiest day of your
life!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Oh, this is about bad bad luck...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
And that's why you should take this! C.B., your
lucky item of the day is an orange-colored snack!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Fortunately, I just happened to have bought this
grilled carrot. Please, be extra careful and keep
this on you!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Wait, really? But you got it for yourself.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
No, I'd rather you have it! It's the least I can do to
keep you safe!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Well, all right. Thanks, I'll take you up on
the offer.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Kyaaaagh! Why did you eat it?!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh, my bad. It just looked so yummy.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: That was your lucky item! Don't you know the horrors that now lurk under your feet?! We need a replacement, right away!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Ah, I know just the thing!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Wait, I can have this too?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Of course! I apologize that it's partially
consumed, but I believe it will act as your shield
from the—
